nasb.text: “Behold, days are coming,” declares the Lord, “when I will sow the house of Israel and the house of Judah with the seed of man and with the seed of beast.

esv.text: “Behold, the days are coming, declares the Lord, when I will sow the house of Israel and the house of Judah with the seed of man and the seed of beast.

cnv.text: “看哪！日子快到，我必使以色列家和猶大家人口和牲畜繁衍。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“看啊，时候将到，我要使以色列和犹大人丁兴旺，牲畜繁多。
